ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organisation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organisation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation that owns the dependency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision of the dependency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dependency */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the dependency */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that uses this configuration */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration (e.g., compile, runtime, required) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asked_revisions" (
  "asked_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asked revision */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that has this asked revision */,
  "asked_revision" TEXT /* Asked revision of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asked revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asked revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asked_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asked_revisions_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that has this release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_updates" (
  "security_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security update */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that has this security update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the security update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the security update */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the security update (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "cvss_score" REAL /* CVSS score of the security update */,
  "cve_id" TEXT /* CVE ID of the security update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_updates_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new release, security update) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "user_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification sent to the user */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that has a relationship with another dependency */,
  "related_dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related dependency */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between dependencies (e.g., depends_on, optional, dev_dependency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_relationships_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_relationships_related_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)
